channel.title: Python on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in Python on LiaScript

item.title: MicroBit-Simulator for LiaScript: Teach MicroPython Without a Physical Device
item.description: The BBC micro:bit is one of the most popular physical computing boards in schools worldwide. With the MicroBit-Simulator template, you can bring it directly into your LiaScript course — no hardware, no installation, no classroom set of devices needed.

item.title: Pyodide for LiaScript: Run Python Directly in Your Course
item.description: Python is the most widely taught programming language in the world. With the Pyodide template, you can bring it directly into your LiaScript course — executable, editable, and fully browser-based.

item.title: How To Code in Python 3
item.description: This is a port of DigitalOcean’s How To Code in Python 3 tutorial series by Lisa Tagliaferri translated to LiaScript with interactive PyScript examples.
